title: Corpus annotation entry
description: Per-declaration annotation YAML for lean-pde-notes. One file per declaration at corpus/<module-path>/<decl-name>.yaml.

name.description: Fully-qualified Lean declaration name (matches extracted/names-fallback.json or decls.json).

file.description: Lean source file path from extracted/decls.json. Optional for unique names, required by validate.py when the declaration name is ambiguous.

tier.description: Annotation depth. 'full' = statement_ja + proof_ja + gap; 'gloss' = 1-3 line role summary only.

statement_ja.description: Japanese translation of the mathematical statement. Required for both tiers.

proof_ja.description: Japanese proof narrative (textbook style). Required when tier=full AND the declaration is theorem-like (theorem/lemma). Optional for def/structure/instance/abbrev. Omit (or leave null) for gloss tier.

gap.description: Formalization gap assessment: how much more verbose is the Lean proof vs. the natural-language proof.

level.description: none = Lean proof closely follows natural language; mild = minor extra technicalities; large = significant formalization overhead.

note.description: Explanation of what inflates the Lean proof. Required when level=large.

chapter.description: Chapter assignment. Must be one of the chapter ids defined in docs/schemas/chapters.yaml.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for cross-cutting concerns (e.g. ['rellich', 'frechet-kolmogorov']).
